tasks.label: 🖥️ Sevalla: Run Cache Warmer
tasks.command: curl -s -X POST 'https://api.sevalla.com/v3/applications/73d65fa7-eff3-4382-ab89-aa95f795ffa5/processes/527976bf-8fc1-4c4f-90e6-d1b81a3fa6d2/exec' -H 'Authorization: Bearer svl_570f93edd991bc4f9c38c00012536840da5b35e61e5fe1b2de26d5b79f62ea26' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"command":["npm","run","warmer"],"timeout":300}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('stdout','')); print(d.get('stderr',''), end='')"

tasks.label: 🖥️ Sevalla: View Warmer Summary
tasks.command: curl -s -X POST 'https://api.sevalla.com/v3/applications/73d65fa7-eff3-4382-ab89-aa95f795ffa5/processes/527976bf-8fc1-4c4f-90e6-d1b81a3fa6d2/exec' -H 'Authorization: Bearer svl_570f93edd991bc4f9c38c00012536840da5b35e61e5fe1b2de26d5b79f62ea26' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"command":["npm","run","logs"],"timeout":15}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('stdout','')); print(d.get('stderr',''), end='')"
